description_long: This chair features a sculpted, ergonomic seat and backrest made from a single piece of curved, dark wood veneer, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The backrest is wide at the top and narrows toward the seat, providing both visual interest and lumbar support. The seat curves gently downward at the front edge, enhancing comfort for the user. Four slender, black metal legs support the chair, each slightly splayed for stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The wood surface has a rich, polished finish that highlights the natural grain, while the metal legs offer a matte contrast. This design is reminiscent of mid-century modern styles, suitable for both stylish urban interiors and semi-outdoor settings like patios or cafes.
description: A modern chair with a curved, polished dark wood seat and backrest, supported by four slender black metal legs. The design is sleek, ergonomic, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, contoured backrest and the gently curved seat with all four black metal legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the pronounced curvature of the seat and backrest, as well as the splayed angle of the metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, sculpted backrest and the smooth wood grain, with the legs partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the ergonomic profile and the seamless transition between seat and backrest.
